name: grim-neigh
short_effect: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
effect_text: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.
flavor_text: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.
